assertion_results.text: Step 4.3 extracts the Upstream Affected Component (webpack) from customfield_10632 and uses it to search for related CVE Jiras (§1.59)
assertion_results.evidence: overlap-check.md line 15: 'Extracted from TC-8011's customfield_10632: webpack'. Line 19 shows the JQL search query using it: 'project = TC AND issuetype = 10024 AND cf[10632] ~ "webpack" AND key != TC-8011'. data-extraction.md line 36 also confirms: 'customfield_10632 (Upstream Affected Component): webpack'.

assertion_results.text: Step 4.3 filters search results by matching PS Component (customfield_10669 = pscomponent:org/rhtpa-ui) and Stream (customfield_10832 = rhtpa-2.2)
assertion_results.evidence: overlap-check.md lines 29-31: 'TC-8012's PS Component (pscomponent:org/rhtpa-ui) matches TC-8011's PS Component -- match' and 'TC-8012's Stream (rhtpa-2.2) matches TC-8011's Stream -- match'. The prerequisite check on lines 7-9 confirms the custom fields customfield_10669 and customfield_10832 are configured and used.

assertion_results.text: Step 4.3 traverses issuelinks on TC-8012 to find remediation task TC-8013 via the 'Depend' link type
assertion_results.evidence: overlap-check.md line 35: 'TC-8012 has one linked remediation task via "Depend" link type:' followed by a table (lines 37-39) showing TC-8013 with summary 'Bump webpack to 5.96.1 in rhtpa-ui [rhtpa-2.2]', Status 'Closed (Done)', Bump Version '5.96.1'.

assertion_results.text: Step 4.3 compares the remediation task's bump version (5.96.1) against the current CVE's fix threshold (5.98.0) and determines the fix does NOT cover this CVE
assertion_results.evidence: overlap-check.md lines 44-51 show the Coverage Comparison table: 'Current CVE (TC-8011) fix threshold: >= 5.98.0', 'Existing remediation (TC-8013) bump target: 5.96.1', 'Comparison: 5.96.1 < 5.98.0', 'Covers this CVE?: NO'. Line 52 states: 'The existing remediation task TC-8013 bumps webpack to 5.96.1, which is below the current CVE's fix threshold of 5.98.0.'

assertion_results.text: The overlap table is presented to the engineer showing TC-8012 and TC-8013 with 'Covers This CVE? = No' — the triage proceeds to create new remediation tasks rather than recommending closure
assertion_results.evidence: overlap-check.md lines 57-64 present the engineer-facing table with columns 'Related CVE | Issue | Remediation Task | Bump Version | Covers This CVE?' showing 'CVE-2026-43210 | TC-8012 | TC-8013 | 5.96.1 | No (threshold: 5.98.0)' followed by 'No existing remediation covers this CVE's fix threshold. Proceeding with new remediation task creation.' triage-outcome.md line 2 confirms: 'Triage Decision: Case A -- Affected, Create Remediation Tasks' with two remediation tasks defined (upstream backport and downstream propagation).
